title: The Lover's Song
content:
Bird sighs for the air,
Thought for I know not where,
For the womb the seed sighs.
Now sinks the same rest
On mind, on nest,
On straining thighs.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Lover's Song"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
